sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ اسْتِخْدَامَ مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi radije svakodnevno koriste društvene mreže.
sentences.translationEn: Many people prefer using social media sites daily.

sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُونَ صُوَرَهُمْ وَيُشَارِكُونَ أَخْبَارَهُمْ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Oni objavljuju svoje fotografije i dijele svoje vijesti s prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: They post their photos and share their news with friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ فِي الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى اتِّصَالٍ دَائِمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme pomažu u održavanju stalnog kontakta.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms help in staying in constant contact.
